changelog: v1.0.3 — Added README.md with overview, features, dependencies, installation, and credits. Standardized GitHub repo metadata (badges, dynamic version pull, MIT license, Qbox required). v1.0.2 — Protected ped support. The 'Rob Civilian' target option no longer appears on script-spawned peds. IsValidRobPed now checks Entity(ped).state.distortionz_protected_ped before allowing the target. Also respects third-party state bag conventions: isShopKeeper, invincible, protected. v1.0.1 — Initial release.
